findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 57. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: Two handwritten signatures present in the PDF are missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows: (1) Brian J. McCrodden's handwritten authorized signature above the date 12/18/07, and (2) the DENR authorized representative's handwritten signature in the 'FOR DENR USE ONLY' section. The HTML replaces the first with just the text 'AUTHORIZED SIGNATURE: Brian J. McCrodden' and the second with 'by [Signature] (Authorized representative of DENR).' — no signature images are rendered.

findings.description: Fabricated table column headers added to multiple tables that have no corresponding headers in the source PDF. Headers such as 'Left Information', 'Right Information', 'Column 1', 'Column 2', 'Column 3', 'Attribute', 'Details', 'Rate Type', 'Role', and 'Rate' are invented text.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 header area has a two-column form layout with no column headers. HTML renders it as a table with <th>Left Information</th> and <th>Right Information</th>. PDF vendor info section is a form with labeled fields but no overarching column headers; HTML adds <th>Column 1</th>, <th>Column 2</th>, <th>Column 3</th>. Exhibit 3 details in the PDF are presented as labeled line items, not tables with 'Attribute'/'Details' headers.

findings.description: Vendor information form from PDF page 1 is restructured into a 3-column table, causing data cells to be duplicated across columns. The original form has a two-region layout (left fields and right fields), not a 3-column structure.
findings.evidence: PDF has 'FEDERAL ID OR SOCIAL SECURITY NO. 52-1413880' once in the right portion of the form. HTML duplicates it in both Column 2 and Column 3 of row 1. PDF has 'FAX NUMBER: 919-831-1295' once; HTML duplicates it in Column 2 and Column 3 of the TYPE OR PRINT NAME row.

findings.description: Content duplication in the vendor info table: several field values that appear once in the PDF are duplicated across multiple columns in the HTML table.
findings.evidence: 'FEDERAL ID OR SOCIAL SECURITY NO. 52-1413880' appears twice (in Column 2 and Column 3). 'FAX NUMBER: 919-831-1295' appears twice. 'Where will services be performed:' appears three times (once per column). All of these appear only once each in the PDF form.

findings.description: Two handwritten signatures present in the PDF are not represented by any tags in the HTML. These are substantive authenticating elements of the document.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 contains the authorized vendor signature (Brian J. McCrodden) and the DENR acceptance signature in the 'FOR DENR USE ONLY' section. The HTML has no tags anywhere in the document.

findings.description: 'AWARD CRITERIA' is a standalone underlined heading in the PDF but is demoted to inline underlined text within a paragraph in the HTML, losing its heading status.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 2 shows 'AWARD CRITERIA:' as a distinct underlined heading. HTML renders it as: '

AWARD CRITERIA: Qualified bids will be evaluated...' — merged into the paragraph rather than as a heading element.
